title: One Hundred Years of Solitude — Yahir's chapter-by-chapter reading notes (chs 7–20)
html:
One Hundred Years of Solitude — Yahir's chapter-by-chapter reading notes

Source: 2022-03-11 Apple Note. Title is a single line — "Made people vote to prove voting is a farce. Only effective thing is violence" — that crystallizes the book's central political claim. The rest is Yahir's chapter notes for One Hundred Years of Solitude by Gabriel García Márquez, chs 7 through 20.

TL;DR

  • Politics-as-farce opener: Colonel Aureliano "made people vote to prove voting is a farce. Only effective thing is violence" — Yahir captured the line as the title, suggesting it landed hard. Lives at the root of the concept page.
  • Lineage as fate: Yahir tracks how José Arcadios and Aurelianos repeat traits across generations — "Aurelianos have similar traits through lineage." The seventeen Aurelianos all named after the Colonel, all stamped with ash on the forehead, all hunted down. The book's thesis becomes Yahir's vocabulary.
  • Cyclical time explicitly named: "Ursula said time is going in a circle, because his grandfather tried doing the same thing." Then: "Time isn't passing it's looping in a circle." Then: "Time is not a concept, days just happen." Three separate captures of the cyclical time motif Yahir will keep returning to.
  • Remedios the Beauty's pheromonal danger: "a natural scent that makes men turn into animals" — Yahir notes the magical realist move of treating physical attraction as literal animal-transformation.
  • Mauricio Babilonia's spinal-cord shooting and the resulting muteness in Meme = Yahir's first encounter with romance-as-doom in the family. Foreshadows his own later relational pattern-tracking.
  • The banana-massacre erasure: "the next day there is no proof of it happening" — corporate-state collusion that disappears history. Yahir captures it cleanly.
  • The closing incest + pig-tailed baby: full circle. "Only one in a century who had been engendered with love." Yahir notes the Melquíades manuscript foretelling everything — the book reading itself as it happens.

Why this note matters

This is the origin trace of lineage as fate and cyclical time in Yahir's vocabulary — both concepts later show up in his thinking-and-things docs about family (dad wisdom, the mom house goal) and his own relational loops. The note is the literary substrate.

The two stray closing lines — "Go beyond the surface go" and "Code tenderloin" — are unrelated drift, classic tail.

Key quotes

  • "Only effective thing is violence."
  • "Time is not a concept, days just happen and that's it, nothing more to it."
  • "Only one in a century who had been engendered with love."

related.label: Violence as the Only Effective Tool
